About Coach Card

Charles Card is a veteran baseball coach based in Las Vegas with over 15 years of experience developing players at all levels. From youth travel ball to adult competitive leagues, Coach Card brings a player-first mentality that focuses on fundamentals, mental toughness, and aggressive approach at the plate.

Whether you're a young player looking to get scouted or a veteran looking to sharpen your game, Coach Card's approach is built around one philosophy: when you step in the box, you're there to do damage.
